$ switchyard --data-dir <DATA_DIR> --endpoint unix://<DATA_DIR>/switchyardd.sock --no-color --format json test <DATA_DIR>/config/missing_test.star
exit: 1
stdout:
stderr:
Error: stat <DATA_DIR>/config/missing_test.star: no such file or directory
Usage:
  switchyard test <file.star | dir/> [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for test

Global Flags:
      --data-dir string    data directory (default "<DEFAULT_DATA_DIR>")
      --endpoint string    API endpoint (unix:///path or tcp://host:port)
      --format string      auto|table|json|yaml (default "auto")
      --log-level string   error|warn|info|debug (default "warn")
      --no-color           disable ANSI color
  -v, --verbose            --log-level=debug shortcut

stat <DATA_DIR>/config/missing_test.star: no such file or directory
